programme.title: Kidnap
programme.desc: After she learns that her son is kidnapped, Karla Dyson, a single mother, sets out to look for him and tries everything possible to get him back.

programme.title: Tai Chi Hero
programme.desc: A look at Yang Luchan's early years, founder of Tai Chi, tracing his rise and the village-saving courage of a gifted child in the 19th-century tale.

programme.title: Peninsula Train To Busan 2
programme.desc: Jung Seok and his team combat zombies in the post-apocalyptic Korean peninsula.

programme.title: Jurassic Hunt
programme.desc: Explorers face a terrifying prehistoric predator in a remote jungle, struggling to survive as danger closes in from every direction.

programme.title: Unfaithful
programme.desc: Connie has a good life, but wants more. She has an affair with a stranger. Her actions have bad results and change her life forever.

programme.title: Atomic Blonde
programme.desc: Lorraine Broughton is the most elite spy in MI6, an agent who's willing to use all of her lethal skills to stay alive during an impossible mission.

programme.title: Dragged Across Concrete
programme.desc: Two suspended cops, one old, one young, turn to crime for money. They quickly find themselves in a dangerous situation, facing unexpected consequences.

programme.title: Blue Iguana
programme.desc: Lawyer Katherine enlists thieves Eddie and Paul to steal a gem, but they unwittingly cross mobster Bradshaw, who's after it.

programme.title: White Haired Princess
programme.desc: As the Ming emperor falls ill, Eunuch Wei attempts to take control. The Wudang sect is tasked with delivering a healing pill, sparking a dangerous conspiracy.

programme.title: Dance With Me
programme.desc: Old friends gather for Jahangir's birthday, only to face his terminal illness. Tensions rise and past issues resurface, leading to reconciliations as they confront life and looming death.

programme.title: Chef Vs Fridge
programme.desc: Celebrities and chefs face off in a fun challenge to create unique dishes using only limited and random ingredients found in their fridge.

programme.title: Battle Drone
programme.desc: A skilled drone pilot is trapped in a lethal conspiracy and must survive high tech battles while uncovering the hidden truth behind the deadly mission.

programme.title: Poseidon Rex
programme.desc: A Belize island is terrorized by a deadly predator from long ago when divers accidentally awaken an ancient evil, threatening everyone's safety and survival now.

programme.title: Higher Power
programme.desc: Sci-fi action film exploring extraordinary abilities, power struggles, and moral choices. Exciting sequences and suspenseful storytelling keep viewers engaged.

programme.title: Nefarious
programme.desc: On the day of his execution, a convicted serial killer claims to a psychiatrist that he's a demon capable of possession, warning her that before long, she will commit three brutal murders herself.

programme.title: The Balkan Line
programme.desc: During the 1999 Kosovo conflict, Serbian soldiers sprint to secure a crucial airport, defend civilians, and bravely hold out until Russian reinforcements arrive soon.

programme.title: Nowhere To Hide
programme.desc: A woman's world turns upside down when a stranger, who's hacked her devices, claims to have kidnapped her daughter.

programme.title: Iron Claw
programme.desc: This story follows the Von Erich brothers, wrestling stars of the 1980s, who face pride, loss, and dream of fame under a strict father and coach.

programme.title: The 355
programme.desc: An elite team of female agents from around the world races against time to stop a ruthless mastermind armed with a devastating cyberweapon that could threaten global security.

programme.title: The Space Between Us
programme.desc: The World Is Beset By The Appearance Of Monstrous Creatures, But One Of Them May Be The Only One Who Can Save Humanity.

programme.title: Official Secrets
programme.desc: Katharine Gun, a British intelligence specialist, risks everything by leaking a top-secret memo to the press in a bold attempt to stop the US-led Iraq invasion backed by her own government.

programme.title: Bad Samaritan
programme.desc: A tense thriller about greed, deception, and a risky heist that spirals into deadly consequences.

programme.title: Hansan
programme.desc: In 1592, Korea battles Japan's mighty navy. When Adm. Yin Sun-sin's forces falter, they unleash the secret weapon-dragon-headed geobukseon ships-to shift the war's outcome.

programme.title: Legend Of Loulan
programme.desc: An epic historical fantasy exploring ancient kingdoms, hidden treasures, and legendary heroes facing dangerous quests.

programme.title: DWM S1
programme.desc: Dance enthusiasts get a chance to showcase their talent through the show, while viewers get the opportunity to learn fun hook steps from the Mohan Sisters, Shakti and Mukti, and a lot more!

programme.title: DWM S1
programme.desc: Dance enthusiasts get a chance to showcase their talent through the show, while viewers get the opportunity to learn fun hook steps from the Mohan Sisters, Shakti and Mukti, and a lot more!

programme.desc: A legendary warrior woman faces trials, magic, and enemies, proving courage and determination in a journey that tests honor and heart.

programme.title: Ip Man
programme.desc: A martial artist in 1930s China loses everything during a brutal invasion. With grit and skill, he must fight to protect his family and honor.

programme.title: Beast Of Burden
programme.desc: Pilot Sean must transport drugs across the US border, but on his final day, he races against time with just an hour to expose the crime and survive the deadly mission.

programme.title: Vertigo -High Lane
programme.desc: A retired San Francisco detective, afraid of heights, looks into his friend's wife. He becomes obsessed with her and the case becomes very complicated.

programme.title: Greenland
programme.desc: To save his family from an apocalyptic end, John undertakes a perilous quest to find the last hope for salvation, confronting the darkest sides of humanity in a desperate fight for survival.

programme.title: Hotel Mumbai
programme.desc: When terrorists take over a hotel, the staff risk their lives to protect the guests. In a fight for survival, they must outsmart the attackers to keep everyone safe in this intense thriller.

programme.title: Cold Skin
programme.desc: A creature feature set on a remote isle where strange sea creatures test human survival instincts.

programme.title: Chef Vs Fridge
programme.desc: Celebrities and chefs compete to prepare unique dishes with limited ingredients.

programme.title: The Marsh King's Daughter
programme.desc: A suspenseful fantasy drama tracing the journey of a royal figure confronting curses, secrets, and moral dilemmas.

programme.title: Iron Claw
programme.desc: This story follows the Von Erich brothers, wrestling stars of the 1980s, who face pride, loss, and dream of fame under a strict father and coach.

programme.title: Tai Chi Hero
programme.desc: Lu Chan marries Yuniang and learns Chen-style Tai Chi. Once forbidden, he transforms it into the most popular form, blending tradition with innovation and earning respect from the village.

programme.title: River God Water
programme.desc: A policeman working with the river salvage team uncovers a puzzling murder when a body is found discarded in the river, sparking a difficult investigation for justice.

programme.title: 47 Meters Down: Uncaged
programme.desc: Four teen girls diving in a ruined underwater city quickly learn they've entered the territory of the deadliest shark species in the claustrophobic labyrinth of submerged caves.

programme.title: Crocodile Island
programme.desc: The Area Around The Devil'S Sea Is Also Known As The Bermuda Triangle Of Asia. Due To Electromagnetic Interference, Aviation Accidents Occur Frequently In The Area. Lin Hao Gallen Lo And His Daughter Yi Liao Yinyue Were Passengers On Flight Gz261. Whi

programme.title: The Mauritanian
programme.desc: A true, harrowing account of Mohamedou Slahi's detention without charge, defended by Nancy Hollander and Teri Duncan, exposing shocking truths and proving the human spirit's resilience.

programme.title: You Were Never Really Here
programme.desc: Joe, a haunted war veteran, sets out to rescue a missing girl. As he digs deeper, he uncovers a disturbing conspiracy that forces him to confront his own demons.

programme.title: Corner Office
programme.desc: An awkward office worker stumbles into corporate chaos, uncovering hidden motives and secrets while trying to find his own purpose.

programme.title: Atomic Blonde
programme.desc: Agent Lorraine Broughton, elite spy, uses skill and courage to survive a Berlin mission. She teams with station chief Percival through a treacherous spy war.

programme.title: Fury
programme.desc: A tough, veteran tank commander leads his crew through a march across war-torn Germany in April 1945, making tough calls, building trust, and facing danger together.

programme.title: Midnight Special
programme.desc: A gifted child with mysterious powers is hunted by authorities while his father races to protect him from forces that want to exploit him.

programme.title: Escape Of Shark
programme.desc: An intense ocean adventure follows daring explorers battling the elements, ruthless foes, and inner fears to escape peril and discover hidden treasures.

programme.title: CVF S2
programme.desc: Six police officers investigate a murder in a suburban lodge. Their only clue is a fake address from the park register. They must solve the mystery quickly.

programme.title: Sansar
programme.desc: A family faces tough times and strained relationships, but the determined leading lady steps up to bring everyone back together and heal their bonds.

programme.title: Phool Aur Angaar
programme.desc: Love with Sudha Verma entangles a middle-class professor in a gangsters' world, leading to murder and mayhem.

programme.title: Ajay
programme.desc: In a gripping quest for justice, Ajay infiltrates the criminal underworld to expose his family's killer, navigating danger and moral dilemmas in a relentless pursuit of truth.

programme.title: Jodidar

programme.title: Dastak

programme.desc: A cheerful young woman's life turns chaotic when love, family expectations and unexpected situations collide, leading to humorous and emotional twists.

programme.title: Ram Lakhan
programme.desc: Two brothers split because of differing beliefs, yet fate brings them back together as they eventually rescue and support each other through unfolding events.

programme.title: Hatya

programme.title: Mili

programme.title: Masss
